title: allosorus greggii
intro: Allosorus greggii, also known as Greggs's spike moss, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Allosorus greggii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Allosorus greggii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
